hero.subtitle: BOOK A DEMO
hero.title: See the platform in action
hero.body: 30 minutes. No commitment. We'll walk you through the modules that matter most to your business.

form.heading: Request a demo
form.intro: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours to schedule a time.
form.label_message: What are you most interested in?
form.placeholder_message: E.g. scheduling & invoicing, payroll, full accounting...

visual.placeholder_text: Product preview video or dashboard screenshot
visual.placeholder_hint: Recommended: 90s Loom showing calendar → task → invoice flow

steps.subtitle: HOW IT WORKS
steps.title: What to expect
steps.step1_desc: Fill in the form above. We'll respond within 24 hours to find a time that works.
steps.step2_desc: 30-minute walkthrough of the modules relevant to your business. Bring your questions.
steps.step3_desc: Get access to a trial environment with your own data. We help you set everything up.

hero.subtitle: BOOK EN DEMO
hero.title: Se platformen i praksis
hero.body: 30 minutter. Ingen forpligtelse. Vi gennemgår de moduler, der er mest relevante for din virksomhed.

form.heading: Bestil en demo
form.intro: Udfyld dine oplysninger, så kontakter vi dig inden for 24 timer for at aftale et tidspunkt.
form.label_message: Hvad er du mest interesseret i?
form.placeholder_message: F.eks. planlægning og fakturering, løn, fuld bogføring...

visual.placeholder_hint: Anbefalet: 90s Loom der viser kalender → opgave → faktura-flow

steps.subtitle: SÅDAN FUNGERER DET
steps.title: Hvad du kan forvente
steps.step1_desc: Udfyld formularen ovenfor. Vi svarer inden for 24 timer og finder et tidspunkt, der passer dig.
steps.step2_desc: 30 minutters gennemgang af de moduler, der er relevante for din virksomhed. Tag dine spørgsmål med.
steps.step3_desc: Få adgang til et prøvemiljø med dine egne data. Vi hjælper dig med at sætte det hele op.
